title: Landscape Paintings by Luiza Niechoda - Resource Pack
description: Adds 70+ paintings of landscapes, forests, mushrooms and all things nature! Original paintings by Luiza Niechoda.
body:
This resource pack contains the textures for over 70 paintings by Luiza Niechoda.

⚠️ Important: This resource pack only provides textures. You also need the matching Datapack to actually enable the new painting variants:


[⏩ Download Luiza’s Paintings – Datapack ⏪](https://modrinth.com/datapack/landscape-paintings-by-luiza-niechoda-datapack)


![2x2 paintings included in the pack (for more view the gallery)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b370dad0e1fb1b9be4baad74839e9a570035d84c.jpeg)

INSTALLATION (or just use the Modrinth app)

Resource Pack (textures)

1. Download `Luiza_Paintings_ResourcePack.zip`.
2. Copy it into your Minecraft **resourcepacks** folder.
   - Default location:
     C:\Users\<YourName>\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks\
3. In-game, go to Options → Resource Packs and move
   Luiza Paintings Resource Pack to the Selected side.
4. Press F3+T to reload textures.


USAGE

- Place a painting on a wall as usual.
- Minecraft will cycle through both vanilla and custom variants that fit the available wall space.
- To directly summon a specific painting (requires cheats or OP):
  /summon painting ~ ~ ~ {variant:"luiza:<name>",facing:0b}
  Example:
  /summon painting ~ ~ ~ {variant:"luiza:moonbather_l",facing:2b}


COPYRIGHT

All paintings included in this pack are original artworks by Luiza Niechoda.

- You may install and use this pack for personal enjoyment.
- You may feature it in screenshots, streams, or videos (credit is appreciated).
- You may not redistribute, modify, or claim the artworks as your own.
- You may not sell or repackage the paintings in any form.

For commercial licensing or collaborations, please contact me by email: luiza@luizacreates.com.

For real-life versions of these artworks, as well as prints, check out my website: [luizacreates.com](https://luizacreates.com/)


NOTES

- Tested on all Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.x versions.
- The pack uses 16×16 pixels per block for a classic Minecraft look.
- Maximum painting sizes supported: 4×4 blocks (64×64 px).
- Some of the paintings are available in multiple sizes, but may be cropped.
- If you only install one of the two packs, the paintings will appear as pink/black missing textures or not at all.
